name: X-Golf Chesapeake
about: X-Golf Chesapeake is an indoor golf simulator facility that offers a modern, comfortable environment for practice, play, and events year-round. The venue features state-of-the-art simulators equipped with proprietary technology that uses laser, light, impact, and camera sensory systems to collect raw golf data at the impact zone. It provides a range of services including golf lessons, professional club fittings, corporate memberships, leagues, and food and drink options, catering to golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Proprietary simulator technology provides comprehensive and accurate ball and club tracking data
Membership options offer predictable costs and discounted rates for frequent players
Full-service bar and grill with premium food and cocktails available on-site
Weekly leagues with leaderboards and prizes for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Premium bar and grill experience with delicious shareable bites and full-service menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary technology combining laser, light, impact and camera sensory systems

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent clubs if needed. The facility is equipped to accommodate golfers with their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a premium bar and grill experience with a full-service menu, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as it can vary based on simulator usage and booking.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention kid-friendly policies or amenities, though it does host events and families may be accommodated.
